name: roll gate constrained departure forty thousand

source.purpose: Forty Thousand departure under an unresolved seal/clearance constraint must compute a required roll gate before Narrator execution.

procedure_void_seal_departure.label: Departure seal constraint
procedure_void_seal_departure.objective: Launch before the reliquary seal fully lifts and the dock guns reacquire the ship.
procedure_void_seal_departure.stakes: A mistimed departure exposes the ship to sanction fire.

constraints.label: Reliquary seal is lifting but the departure corridor is not clear
constraints.clearsWhen: The cockpit burn is timed through the opening seal

established: The ship is still in the launch cradle.
The reliquary seal has begun to lift but the corridor is not clear.

input.playerInput: I go to the cockpit and fly once the seal lifts.
